name: Marcee's Hot Cucumbers Phreelee
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Korean chile powder (Mexican won't do, from Asian food shop)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice ends off the cucumbers and rub against the ends to get the bitterness out. A white frothy paste will form.
2. Peel cucumbers and slice into about 1/8 inch slices.
3. Add finely chopped garlic and green onions.
4. Add approximately 1/4 cup soy sauce, 1/4 cup white vinegar, and 1 tablespoon sesame oil.
5. Add 1 teaspoon chile powder at a time and adjust for taste.
6. Marinate, chill, and serve. The recipe can be doubled easily.
